attributes.description: Welcome to your learning repository. Use this space to write markdown notes.

post.html:
Introduction

Welcome to your Generic Notes Repository! 🎉

This site is powered by Next.js and generates a beautiful, static documentation site from Markdown files. It's the perfect place to drop all your notes, tutorials, and snippets.

How it works

  1. This entire site is generated from the lessons/ folder in your repository.
  2. Every folder inside lessons/ becomes a Section in the sidebar.
  3. Every Markdown file inside a folder becomes a Page.

Example Code Block

Here is how syntax highlighting looks:

function greet(name) {
  return `Hello, ${name}!`;
}

console.log(greet("Developer"));

Feel free to delete these boilerplate files and create your own!
post.markdown:
# Introduction

Welcome to your **Generic Notes Repository**! 🎉

This site is powered by Next.js and generates a beautiful, static documentation site from Markdown files. It's the perfect place to drop all your notes, tutorials, and snippets.

## How it works

1. This entire site is generated from the `lessons/` folder in your repository.
2. Every folder inside `lessons/` becomes a **Section** in the sidebar.
3. Every Markdown file inside a folder becomes a **Page**.

### Example Code Block

Here is how syntax highlighting looks:

```javascript
function greet(name) {
  return `Hello, ${name}!`;
}

console.log(greet("Developer"));
```

Feel free to delete these boilerplate files and create your own!
post.title: Introduction
